'''nathuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuliyat|kabuliyat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuliyat|kabuliyat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nathuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthiwith|næthiwith]] || [[word:næthiwij|næthiwij]] || [[word:næthiwish|næthiwish]] || [[word:næthiwi|næthiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathuthuwuth|nathuthuwuth]] || [[word:nathuthuwuj|nathuthuwuj]] || [[word:nathuthuwush|nathuthuwush]] || [[word:nathuthuwu|nathuthuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathuwuth|nathuwuth]] || [[word:nathuwuj|nathuwuj]] || [[word:nathuwush|nathuwush]] || [[word:nathuwu|nathuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathufwuth|nathufwuth]] || [[word:nathufwuj|nathufwuj]] || [[word:nathufwush|nathufwush]] || [[word:nathufwuf|nathufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nathuwuthu|nathuwuthu]] || [[word:nathuwuju|nathuwuju]] || [[word:nathuwushu|nathuwushu]] || [[word:nathuwuku|nathuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nathuwuth|nathuwuth]] || [[word:nathuwuj|nathuwuj]] || [[word:nathuwush|nathuwush]] || [[word:nathuwu|nathuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nathuwuthul|nathuwuthul]] || [[word:nathuwujul|nathuwujul]] || [[word:nathuwushul|nathuwushul]] || [[word:nathuwukul|nathuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nathuwuthuthu|nathuwuthuthu]] || [[word:nathuwujuju|nathuwujuju]] || [[word:nathuwushushu|nathuwushushu]] || [[word:nathuwuku|nathuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nathuwuthun|nathuwuthun]] || [[word:nathuwujun|nathuwujun]] || [[word:nathuwushun|nathuwushun]] || [[word:nathuwukun|nathuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nathuwuthuoro|nathuwuthuoro]] || [[word:nathuwujuoro|nathuwujuoro]] || [[word:nathuwushuoro|nathuwushuoro]] || [[word:nathuwukuoro|nathuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
